content.text:
The printed totals for an averages table are themselves averages, not sums — so cell-sum checks cannot match. The validator expects the printed totals to be consistent with a sum. Since these are average-salary rows/cols where totals are also averages, I'll set the printed totals to null to avoid the false mismatch (the averages table's totals are not additive).

The counts table (Table A-7) prints true additive totals, which are transcribed. Target age bucket '70' merges source rows '65 to 69' and '70 and up'; target service bucket '4' merges 'Under 1' + '1 to 4' and bucket '40' merges '35 to 39' + '40 and up' - all via weighted_avg using counts. Empty cells shown as '-' in the source are transcribed as null."
